text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm headed to the mall to do some<n>shopping,
suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa yeah! Time to traaain!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Walk fast! Don't crash into anyone!<n>Go, go... Go,
go, go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pheeew! Nailed it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the heck are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Taishin! I'm just doing some
walking-quickly-through-crowds<n>training!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I saw Hayahide doing this the otherday. She looked super serious. Ibet it's the secret to her power!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh... There's no way that's right.<n>You're going to
get yourself hurt.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aww, thanks for worrying about me!<n>But I'm fine!
I'll totally pull it off. Just<n>you watch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll go even faster this time! Go, go...<n>GO, GO—GAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: CRASHHH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oof! That wall came outta nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh! It hurts, but I'm fine! No matter<n>how many
times I fall, I'll get right<n>back up!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? What could you two possibly be<n>doing?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! Hayahide! I'm trying that training<n>you were
doing the other day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, the<n>dashing-through-crowds routine! I
can't believe you were using stores<n>to train! SO
cool!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The other day? Oh, that had nothing to<n>do with
training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I... well... I was in a hurry to<n>read the
academic journal I'd bought.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! You mean you just<n>wanted to get
home faster?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, does this mean that time I saw<n>Taishin
hopping across the white<n>lines on the crosswalk,
she was<n>just... No way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! When did you see that? Wait,<n>why would
you think that had<n>anything to do with training?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gimme a BREAK! I was gonna do that<n>next!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm your greatest rival! So I've gotta<n>get waaay
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's your idea of rivalry? ...Oh dear.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Should rivals really need to use such<n>roundabout
methods to compete<n>effectively?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Running is enough.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Running! Oh yeeeaaah! That's it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're right. We just gotta run! Full<n>speed ahead,
like always!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What are we waiting for?! LET'S<n>GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! I didn't mean right now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How unruly... Though, we'll be left<n>behind at this
rate. I guess we have<n>no choice but to compete.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh. Sigh. Fiiiiine.
